generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first axis, providing angular position r_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearwheel gearbox, providing angle r_G"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance FrictionParameterComputationComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Digital‑shadow component that continuously identifies static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData FrictionParametersTransmitted
]

instance SimulationComparisonComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Digital‑shadow component that compares simulated and measured position traces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulationComparisonTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance FrictionParametersTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom FrictionParameterComputationComponent
]

instance SimulationComparisonTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulationComparisonComponent
]

// C10: Data
instance MeasuredMotorAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angle r_M from MotorEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox angle r_G from GearboxEncoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor input current I_M from CurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance FrictionParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Identified static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters used by the robot controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionParametersTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RobotController
]

instance SimulationComparisonData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Deviation between simulated (^r_M, ^r_G, ^r_out) and measured (r_M, r_G, r_out) angles"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulationComparisonTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for streaming live sensor data from the robot to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService, ModelValidationService
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment for simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService, ModelValidationService
]

instance RobotController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot controller that receives friction parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterSupplyService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell integrating model data and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance WebDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard application for visualizing real‑time data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDashboardService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing real‑time measured vs simulated behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionDiscrepancyInsight, ControllerRetuningAction
]

instance FrictionParameterSupplyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that supplies updated friction parameters to the motion control algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionParameterInsight, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that validates simulation models against measured data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters provided in real time"
]

instance PositionDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time insight on discrepancies between measured and simulated positions, indicating drift due to wear"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on model validity based on comparison of measured and simulated behavior"
]

// C17: Actions
instance ControllerRetuningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action for engineers to retune the robot controller based on detected drift"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update the robot controller with newly identified friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of motor, gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkFrictionlessDrivetrainModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the friction‑less drivetrain of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Coulomb‑Viscous friction model for the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance TorqueComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processing component that computes torque τ from measured current and motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance VelocityComputationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Processing component that computes angular velocity ω from encoder signals"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow consists of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), the Asset (MABI robot first axis), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB) that consume measured DataTraces and apply simulation models to produce simulated DataTraces, all instantiated from the Digital Shadow Reference Model. The resulting data are visualized in a unified dashboard for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is created and operated during the runtime (operational) phase of the robot, using live data to continuously identify friction while the robot is machining."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability is enforced by linking each DataTrace to its originating sensor, processing component and simulation model. Validation is performed by comparing simulated friction‑subtracted outputs with measured reference data. Both white‑box analytical friction models and black‑box data‑driven models are continuously updated to maintain accuracy during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted over MQTT; the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) is used to expose model metadata and enable integration with the processing components. No bidirectional protocol is defined for control feedback."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The approach follows the Digital Shadow Reference Model (UML class diagram), uses SysML (an OMG standard) for system architecture, and adopts the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for Industry 4.0 asset representation."
]
